home.hero_description: Building highly competent personnel for New Growth Engine industries under Thailand 4.0 policy and reforming Thai higher education
home.goal_description: To develop high-performance personnel for the New Growth Engine industries under Thailand 4.0 policy and reform Thai higher education. We aim to equip graduates with cutting-edge skills ready to drive innovation and economic growth.
home.feature_industry_desc: Curriculum designed with industry leaders to meet real-world demands and prepare students for immediate employment
home.feature_expert_desc: Learn from leading experts and academics with extensive experience in Thailand's growing technology sector
home.feature_certificate_desc: Gain hands-on experience with the latest technologies driving Thailand's economic transformation
home.feature_technology_desc: Focus on project-based learning that simulates real workplace scenarios to build skills and portfolios
home.feature_practice_desc: Develop analytical thinking and problem-solving skills essential for driving innovation
home.feature_innovation_desc: Develop analytical thinking and problem-solving skills essential for driving innovation

about.title: About Our Project
about.our_goal_desc:
The Thailand 4.0 Graduate Training Program aims to develop high-performance personnel for New Growth Engine industries in line with the Thailand 4.0 policy and reform Thai higher education. We are committed to bridging the gap between academic knowledge and industry needs by providing hands-on training in cutting-edge technologies and business practices.

Our program is designed to produce graduates who are not only technically proficient but also possess the analytical, problem-solving, and entrepreneurial skills necessary to drive innovation and economic growth in Thailand's key industries.
about.vision_desc:
We envision Thailand becoming a hub of innovation and technological advancement in Southeast Asia, with a highly skilled workforce driving sustainable economic growth and development across all sectors.

Through our program, we aim to contribute to Thailand's transformation into a value-driven economy powered by innovation, technology, and creativity, in line with the government's Thailand 4.0 economic model.
about.objective_skill_desc: Equip graduates with practical skills and knowledge aligned with Thailand's target S-Curve industries, ensuring immediate employability and value addition to employers
about.objective_innovation_desc: Cultivate an innovative and entrepreneurial mindset among participants, encouraging them to develop new solutions to real-world problems and create value-added products and services
about.objective_collaboration_desc: Build strong partnerships between educational institutions and industry players to ensure curriculum relevance and provide students with real-world experience through internships and collaborative projects
about.objective_economy_desc: Contribute to Thailand's economic transformation by producing skilled personnel who can drive growth in high-value industries and help the country escape the middle-income trap

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.description: Join Thailand's premier training program for New Growth Engine industries. Applications are now open for the 2024 cohort.
admissions.qual_bachelor_desc: Completed a bachelor's degree or higher in a related field (specific requirements vary by course)
admissions.qual_recent_graduate_desc: Graduated within the last 3 years or currently in your final year of study
admissions.qual_thai_nationality_desc: Thai citizen or possess the necessary permits to study and work in Thailand
admissions.qual_language_desc: Demonstrate proficiency in Thai and/or English (depending on the course)
admissions.qual_commitment_desc: Able to commit to the program full-time for the specified duration
admissions.doc_application_desc: Complete the online application form thoroughly
admissions.doc_cv_desc: An up-to-date resume highlighting your education, skills, and relevant experience
admissions.doc_statement_desc: A statement explaining your interest in the program and how it aligns with your career goals (500–800 words)
admissions.doc_reference_desc: At least one letter of recommendation from an academic or professional reference
admissions.step1_desc: Complete the online application form and upload all required documents through our secure application portal
admissions.step2_desc: Our admissions team will review your application and documents to ensure eligibility requirements are met
admissions.step3_desc: Qualified candidates will be invited to take an online assessment test related to their chosen course
admissions.step4_desc: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an in-person or virtual interview with program faculty and industry representatives
admissions.step5_desc: Final decisions will be communicated to all applicants, with successful candidates receiving registration instructions
admissions.alert_note: Some courses may have additional specific requirements. Please check the details on each course page.

contact.title: Contact Us

contact.form_description: Fill in the details below and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.error_desc: Please try again or contact us through other channels.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our training programs, application process, and more.
faq.q1: How long are the training programs?
faq.q1_a: The duration of training programs varies by course, generally ranging from 3-6 months depending on the field and study format. Some programs may extend up to 1 year for in-depth training.
faq.q2: Is there a fee to participate in the program?
faq.q2_a: The BunditPunMai project is funded by the Ministry of Higher Education, Science, Research and Innovation (MHESI). Therefore, participants do not have to pay training fees, except for certain personal expenses such as travel or accommodation.
faq.q3: What is the application process like?
faq.q3_a: The application process consists of 5 steps: (1) Submit an online application with relevant documents (2) Preliminary eligibility check (3) Assessment test for the chosen course (4) Interview with the committee (5) Announcement of results. Applicants can track their status online.
faq.q4: Do you offer job placement after completing the program?
faq.q4_a: The program has partnerships with leading industries. Graduates will receive support for job connections with partner companies. However, employment depends on the individual's abilities and readiness, as well as labor market demand at the time.
faq.q5: Are the courses offered online or in-person?
faq.q5_a: The program offers online, on-site, and hybrid learning formats depending on the course nature. Some courses are held at partner higher education institutions, while others can be taken online.
faq.q6: What certification will I receive upon completion?
faq.q6_a: Graduates who complete the program will receive a certificate from the higher education institution conducting the training in collaboration with the BunditPunMai project. This certificate is endorsed by the Ministry of Higher Education, Science, Research and Innovation.
faq.q7_a: Currently, the BunditPunMai project primarily accepts Thai nationals. However, international applicants may apply for some courses with international partnerships, provided they have the necessary permits for studying in Thailand. Please check details for each course.
